---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that aligns with the project goals
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed improvement.

## Problem or Opportunity

What problem does this solve, or what opportunity does it create?

## Proposed Change

Describe the solution or improvement you want to suggest.

## Why It Fits This Project

Explain how this aligns with the I-A-C-K Framework’s goals, research direction, or repository roadmap.

## Possible Tradeoffs

List any tradeoffs, risks, or limitations.

## Additional Context

Add references, notes, or examples if helpful.
